CREATE TABLE test_intervals (date Date, interval_length UInt32);
SELECT date + toIntervalYear(interval_length) AS result FROM test_intervals;
WITH (SELECT SUM(interval_length) FROM test_intervals) AS total_years SELECT date + toIntervalYear(total_years) AS result FROM test_intervals WHERE interval_length > 0;
WITH toDate('2021-01-01') AS start_date SELECT start_date + toIntervalYear(5) AS five_years_later;
WITH (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_intervals WHERE interval_length > 0) AS count_positive SELECT date + toIntervalYear(count_positive) AS result FROM test_intervals;
WITH (SELECT interval_length FROM test_intervals WHERE date = toDate('2024-06-15')) AS years SELECT date + toIntervalYear((SELECT MAX(interval_length) FROM years)) AS result_max_years;
CREATE TABLE dates_table (start_date DateTime, end_date DateTime);
SELECT start_date + toIntervalYear(1) AS next_year FROM dates_table;
SELECT end_date - toIntervalYear(2) AS two_years_earlier FROM dates_table;
SELECT start_date, end_date, (end_date - start_date) / toIntervalYear(1) AS years_difference FROM dates_table;
